values: The loom has been idle for a week because there is nothing to weave
Winter is coming and the settlement has half the cloth it needs for warm clothing
The tailor's workshop is bare. No bolts, no scraps, no thread
Bandage supplies are critically low and the healer is making that very clear
We promised cloth to a merchant caravan and now we cannot deliver
The sails on the ferry need replacing and there is no fabric to work with
The bedding in the common house is falling apart and there is nothing to patch it with
A family lost everything in the fire. They need basic clothing and we have no materials
The upholsterer has commissions waiting and no stuffing or covering to finish them
Flags and banners for the celebration need materials the dyer does not have
The rope maker needs fiber. The net maker needs rope. The fisherman needs nets. You see the problem
The padding for the guards' armor is worn through and the quartermaster is out of stock
We trade textiles for iron. No textiles means the forge stays cold too
The tentmaker needs canvas for the expedition. Canvas requires materials we do not have
Mending clothes is one thing. Having nothing to mend them with is another
